narrative:
Ashville-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 991 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
